entity.summary: Denmark-based BitShares decentralized exchange platform officially launched in October 2015 and closed down on 2020-05-15 after an exchange closure notice.
entity.notes: Terminal handling uses 2020-05-15 because public exchange-status coverage states that OpenLedger DEX closed down as of that date after releasing a closure message. Death reason is mapped to voluntary_shutdown because the closure was announced by the exchange itself. Launch date uses the 2015-10-13 official launch marker from public launch reporting. CCEDK is recorded as a predecessor because CCEDK transitioned from its original exchange role into the OpenLedger-centered structure in 2016.

evidence.title: OpenLedger's Crypto Financial Platform Officially Launching
evidence.notes: Contemporary launch coverage identifies October 13, 2015 as the official OpenLedger launch date.

evidence.title: OpenLedger DEX closure update
evidence.notes: The exchange-status page preserves the OpenLedger closure message and states that the DEX closed down as of May 15, 2020.
